trees.description: The Vault Hunter gains increased Maximum Health and Shields.

perks.name: Sturdy Stuff
perks.description: Fight For Your Life lasts longer when not moving, and Second Winds fully restore the Vault Hunter's Health.
perks.effects: FFYL Duration: +50% when not moving | Health Restoration: 100%

perks.name: Bullets Are Scared Of Me
perks.description: The Vault Hunter gains increased Damage Reduction based on the fullness of their Shield or Health, whichever has higher Maximum.
perks.effects: Damage Reduction: 30% when Full

perks.name: The Best Defense
perks.description: The Vault Hunter gains increased Damage Dealt based on the fullness of their Shield or Health, whichever has higher Maximum.
perks.effects: Damage Dealt: +30% when Full

trees.description: The Vault Hunter gains increased Ordnance Cooldown Rate.

perks.name: Tripwire
perks.description: Reduce Ordnance Cooldown whenever Action Skill is activated.
perks.effects: Ordnance Cooldown Reduction: 25%

perks.name: Full Spectrum Arsenal
perks.description: Ordnance Damage now benefits from increases to Gun Damage.
perks.effects: Ordnance Damage: 50% of increases to Gun Damage

perks.name: Fragmentation Payload
perks.description: Ordnance gains a chance to Critically Hit enemies, and also gains increased Ordnance Critical Hit Damage.
perks.effects: Ordnance Critical Hit Chance: 5% | Ordnance Critical Hit Damage: +50%

trees.description: The Vault Hunter gains increased Gun Damage.

perks.name: Lead or Alive
perks.description: When entering Fight For Your Life, all Guns are automatically Reloaded, and the Vault Hunter gains increased Fire Rate.
perks.effects: Fire Rate: +25% while in FFYL

perks.name: CQC
perks.description: Melee Damage grants the Vault Hunter increased Fire Rate for a Duration.
perks.effects: Fire Rate: +30% | Duration: 8 seconds

perks.name: Riddle You This
perks.description: Whenever the Vault Hunter deals Gun Damage, gain a Stack of Riddle You This, increasing Gun Damage.
perks.effects: Gun Damage: +1% per Stack | Maximum Stacks: 50 | Duration: 6 seconds

trees.description: The Vault Hunter gains increased Reload Speed and Accuracy.

perks.name: Down But Not Out
perks.description: During Fight For Your Life the Vault Hunter can now Aim down sights and does not suffer Gun Accuracy penalties.
perks.effects: ADS enabled in FFYL | No accuracy penalty

perks.name: In The Zone
perks.description: While Aiming, the Vault Hunter gains increased Gun Damage and Critical Hit Damage per second. Bonuses are lost after 2 seconds of not Aiming.
perks.effects: Gun Damage: +5% per Stack | Critical Hit Damage: +5% per Stack | Maximum Stacks: 5

perks.name: One Shot, One Kill
perks.description: Kill Skill. Excess Damage will be Stored and added to your next Gun Shot.
perks.effects: Excess Damage Stored: 100% | Stored Duration: 12 seconds

trees.description: The Vault Hunter gains increased Critical Hit Damage and Status Effect Damage.
trees.baseEffect: Critical Hit Damage & Status Effect Damage

perks.name: Contamination
perks.description: Critical Hits grant increased Status Effect Application Chance.
perks.effects: Status Effect Application Chance: +10% per Stack | Stack Duration: 10 seconds | Maximum Stacks: 10

perks.name: Compounding Afflictions
perks.description: Enemies take increased Damage for each Status Effect applied to them.
perks.effects: Damage Taken: +1% per Status Effect

perks.name: Overkill
perks.description: Kill Skill. Killing an enemy with a Critical Hit will cause them to explode, dealing Skill Damage.
perks.effects: Damage Dealt: 50% of initial hit

trees.description: The Vault Hunter gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate.

perks.name: Now With Caffeine
perks.description: Reduce Action Skill Cooldown whenever a Repkit is activated.
perks.effects: Action Skill Cooldown Reduction: 25%

perks.name: I Am A Gun
perks.description: Action Skill Damage now benefits from increases to Gun Damage.
perks.effects: Action Skill Damage: +50% of increases to Gun Damage

perks.name: A Honed Mind
perks.description: Action Skills gain a chance to Critically Hit enemies, and also gain increased Action Skill Critical Hit Damage.
perks.effects: Action Skill Critical Hit Chance: 5% | Action Skill Critical Hit Damage: +50%

trees.description: The Vault Hunter gains increased Movement Speed and Melee Damage.

perks.name: Bear Arms
perks.description: Melee Damage now benefits from increases to Gun Damage.
perks.effects: Melee Damage: 50% of increases to Gun Damage

perks.name: Bullet Train
perks.description: The Vault Hunter can now Hipfire while Sprinting, and gain Gun Damage the faster they move.
perks.effects: Gun Damage: +15% when Walking

perks.name: Groundbreaker
perks.description: Non-Melee Attack Damage and Slam Damage are Stored. Melee Attacks and Slam deal Kinetic Bonus Damage equal to all Stored Damage.
perks.effects: Stored Damage: 20% | Stored Damage Duration: 5 seconds
